include: base character and prop atlas metadata

manualBuildNotes: Use Cocos Creator 3.x WeChat Minigame target.
Open the generated build in WeChat Developer Tools.
For real-device playtests, set globalThis.__PROP_HIDE_SEEK_ROOM_SERVER_URL__ or WeChat storage key prop_hide_seek_room_server_url to the tested ws/wss endpoint.
Record final build package size after the first real Cocos export.
